expectations.text: has_python_code: 输出了 analysis.py 文件，包含可执行的 Python 分析代码
expectations.evidence: analysis.py exists with 171 lines of executable Python code including data definition, funnel calculations, contribution analysis, and CSV output

expectations.text: identifies_biggest_dropoff: 识别'点击注册按钮'步骤为最大漏点（转化率下降4个百分点，UV损失最多）
expectations.evidence: Code shows 点击注册按钮 has the highest extra_churn (35800 additional users lost vs last month), and the contribution analysis would rank it highest. The step shows -4pp conversion rate decline (25% -> 21%)

expectations.text: quantifies_each_step: 各漏斗步骤有量化的转化率变化和用户流失人数
expectations.evidence: Section 4 outputs each step's last_rate, this_rate, diff_pp. Section 5 outputs lost users and churn rates for each step (e.g., '额外流失: 35,800' for 点击注册按钮)

expectations.text: provides_priority_order: 给出了问题排查的优先级顺序
expectations.evidence: Section 6 '单步修复模拟' sorts steps by improvement_pp and outputs ordered list showing which step recovery would help most (e.g., '点击注册按钮: 提升 +0.372个点 (恢复 33.6% 损失)')

expectations.text: has_root_cause_hypotheses: 列出了可能的根因假设（如页面改版、加载速度、按钮位置、文案变化等）
expectations.evidence: No root cause hypotheses are provided in the code. The output only contains numerical calculations without any business hypotheses about potential causes of the funnel dropoff

expectations.text: distinguishes_rate_vs_volume: 区分了转化率下降和流量变化的各自影响
expectations.evidence: Code separately tracks rate changes (conv rates per step) vs volume changes (UV at each stage). Section 5 explicitly calculates extra_churn (volume) separate from rate changes. The overall decline is attributed to both rate decline and the analysis shows this explicitly
